channel.title: Perimenopause Symptoms & Signs — Hush
channel.description: Perimenopause Symptoms & Signs — hormone-free menopause self-care pins from Hush.

item.title: What a Menopause Hot Flash Actually Feels Like
item.description: The sudden wave of heat, the flush, the racing heart out of nowhere - if no one prepared you for menopause hot flashes, you're not the only one. Our guide walks through what they actually feel like and why they happen. Save this and read it on the blog. #menopausehotflashes #perimenopause #midlifewellness
